crossEventQuestion: When should workforce resources be reduced or reallocated toward higher-priority work?
observation: The 2023 reset and 2026 transformation align headcount and cost structure with focused priorities and productivity.
invariant: Reduce or reallocate resources when current deployment is not aligned with the highest-priority work and productive use.
boundaryConditions: Priority alignment, productivity, and continued investment in focused areas must be reviewed together.
unresolvedConflicts: The bounded public event set contains no reviewed opposite action under the same resource-productivity conditions.

decisionAxis.decisionQuestion: When should workforce resources be reduced or reallocated?

conditions: Resources must move toward the highest-priority and most productive uses.

conditionDelta: No reviewed opposite-condition workforce event is available in the bounded public evidence set.
actionDelta: Retain the current allocation only while priority alignment and productivity remain supportable.
